# P-C-005 — Supplier-favouring currency arbitrage

> Arbitrage de change en faveur du fournisseur

<!-- BEGIN auto-generated -->

## Description (EN)

XAF/EUR or XAF/USD invoicing rate diverges from the BEAC fixing of the payment date by ≥ 4 %.

## Description (FR)

Conversion XAF/EUR ou XAF/USD appliquée à la facturation différant de plus de 4 % du fixing BEAC du jour.

<!-- END auto-generated -->

## Detection logic

Currency arbitrage — payment in a different currency than the contract, with the FX conversion timed to disadvantage the public purse.

## Likelihood-ratio reasoning

Default prior 0.16 + weight 0.5 — the signal is indirect and harder to substantiate.

## Known false-positive traps

- **Genuine FX volatility** absent any deliberate timing.

## Production wiring

Requires the BEAC payment adapter for the FX rate at payment time. The pattern's value scales with the depth of historical FX data.
